subcodes.first_line: The utterance of Their tongue is the voice of the trees: today the warmth of the fire of yearning blazes forth from the Tree, setting aflame the horizons of hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیان شان لسان حال اشجار ناطق حرارت از نار حال از شجر ظاهر امروز آفاق قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @symbolism, @love of God
